page.title: Advanced Fronting And Emphasis
page.subtitle_html: Advanced Fronting And Emphasis - C2 fronted complements, locative inversion, negative fronting, and emphatic focus.
page.subtitle_text: C2 fronted complements, locative inversion, negative fronting, and emphatic focus.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"Advanced fronting and emphasis: compact C2 anchors for moving information to the front of a sentence for focus and cohesion.","rules":[{"label":"Locative and complement fronting","text":"Front place, direction, or complement phrases when they carry discourse focus.","example":"At the heart of the problem lies a lack of trust."},{"label":"Negative and limiting focus","text":"Use fronted negative or limiting phrases carefully, with inversion where required by the structure.","example":"Only then did the implications become clear."},{"label":"Controlled emphasis","text":"Use fronting to highlight contrast, not as a decorative word-order change.","example":"What matters most is the reliability of the evidence."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the English Sentence Builder C2 lesson on advanced fronting and emphasis.
